mapper.insert: insert into platform_agents (id, name, system_prompt, model_id, tool_ids, memory_policy, knowledge_base_policy) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{systemPrompt}, #{modelId}, case when #{toolIdsCsv} is null or #{toolIdsCsv} = '' then '{}'::text[] else string_to_array(#{toolIdsCsv}, ',') end, cast(#{memoryPolicyJson} as jsonb), cast(#{knowledgeBasePolicyJson} as jsonb))
mapper.select: select id, name, system_prompt, model_id, array_to_string(tool_ids, ',') as tool_ids_csv, cast(memory_policy as text) as memory_policy_json, cast(knowledge_base_policy as text) as knowledge_base_policy_json, created_at from platform_agents where id = #{id}
